## GET /api/users

**List all users**

Get paginated list of users. Sort format: 'fieldName,direction' (e.g., 'username,asc' or 'createdAt,desc')

Operation ID: `all`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Query Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| pageable | string | Yes | Pagination parameters. Use sort format: 'fieldName,asc' or 'fieldName,desc'. Allowed fields: id, username, enabled, createdAt, updatedAt |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `paginated list of UserDto (see Pagination Envelope in index.md)`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| username | string | No |  |  |
| enabled | boolean | No |  |  |
| roles | array<string> | No |  |  |
| permissions | array<string> | No |  |  |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  |  |

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |

## PUT /api/users/{userId}/roles

**Assign roles to user**

Assigns roles to a user (full replace - removes existing roles)

Operation ID: `assignRoles`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: USER_MANAGE_ROLES (found on service:UserService)

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| userId | integer | Yes |  |

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleNames | array<string> | Yes |  |  |

| updatedBy | string | No |  |  |

## POST /api/users/search

**Dynamic search for users**

Advanced search with dynamic filtering, sorting, and pagination.

**Allowed Search Fields**: id, username, enabled, createdAt
**Allowed Sort Fields**: id, username, enabled, createdAt

**Supported Operators**:
- EQ: Equals (=)
- NE: Not Equals (!=)
- GT: Greater Than (>)
- GE: Greater or Equal (>=)
- LT: Less Than (<)
- LE: Less or Equal (<=)
- LIKE: Contains (case-insensitive)
- IN: In list
- IS_NULL: Is null
- IS_NOT_NULL: Is not null
- BETWEEN: Between two values

**Example Request Body**:
```json
{
  "filters": [
    {"field": "username", "op": "LIKE", "value": "admin"},
    {"field": "enabled", "op": "EQ", "value": true}
  ],
  "page": 0,
  "size": 20,
  "sortBy": "createdAt",
  "sortDir": "DESC"
}
```


Operation ID: `search_2`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `UserSearchContractRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| filters | array<ContractFilter> | No |  |  |
| filters[].field | string | No |  |  |
| filters[].operator | string | No |  |  |
| filters[].value | object | No |  |  |
| sorts | array<ContractSort> | No |  |  |
| sorts[].field | string | No |  |  |
| sorts[].direction | string | No |  |  |
| page | integer (int32) | No |  |  |
| size | integer (int32) | No |  |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `paginated list of UserDto (see Pagination Envelope in index.md)`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| username | string | No |  |  |
| enabled | boolean | No |  |  |
| roles | array<string> | No |  |  |
| permissions | array<string> | No |  |  |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  |  |

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |

## POST /api/v1/security/role-branches

**Assign a branch scope to a role**

إسناد فرع لدور - RULE-SEC-035, RULE-SEC-036

Operation ID: `create_1`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `CreateSecRoleBranchRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleIdFk | integer (int64) | Yes |  | Role ID | 1 |
| branchIdFk | integer (int64) | Yes |  | Branch ID | 1 |
| dataAccessLevel | string | Yes |  | Data access level (LOV-SEC-002: BRANCH_ONLY / BRANCH_AND_CHILDREN / ALL) | BRANCH_ONLY |

**Request Example**

```json
{
  "roleIdFk": 1,
  "branchIdFk": 1,
  "dataAccessLevel": "BRANCH_ONLY"
}
```

Shape: `SecRoleBranchDto`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | Role ID (composite PK part 1) | 1 |
| branchIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | Branch ID (composite PK part 2) | 1 |
| dataAccessLevel | string | No |  | Data access level (LOV-SEC-002: BRANCH_ONLY / BRANCH_AND_CHILDREN / ALL) | BRANCH_ONLY |
| isActiveFl | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Creation timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Last update timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |

**Response Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json

  "dataAccessLevel": "BRANCH_ONLY",
```

## POST /api/v1/security/user-profiles

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| userIdFk | integer (int64) | Yes |  | User ID to create the profile for (shared PK with USERS) | 1 |
| branchIdFk | integer (int64) | Yes |  | Active branch ID assigned to the user (RULE-SEC-034) | 1 |
| fullNameAr | string | No | maxLength: 200 | Full name (Arabic) |  |
| fullNameEn | string | No | maxLength: 100 | Full name (English) |  |
| preferredLang | string | No | maxLength: 10 | Preferred language code |  |
| employeeIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | Employee ID (unconstrained — OQ-005, no HR module governed yet) |  |

```json
}
```

| employeeIdFk | integer (int64) | No |  | Employee ID (unconstrained — OQ-005, no HR module governed yet) |  |
